thoughts: The user wants me to run a Jira sync script and monitor it for 5-15 minutes.
I need to execute the python command first, then set up monitoring by checking the log file every 30 seconds up to 10 times.
Once complete, I'll send a success notification with ticket count; on failure, an error notification.
This is a long-running task that requires patience and proper error handling.
